mainHtml:
Home page/Resources/Design Guidelines

Preparation of drawings and design specifications

Organizing model, drawings, tolerances, materials, Surface Finishing and inspection requirements can significantly reduce the risk of quotation communication and production rework.

2D drawingscritical dimensionsToleranceTesting requirements

Pre-quote information list

This page is a preparation suggestion and does not replace the client's internal design specifications or industry standard documents.

Model information

Confirm the unit, coordinate direction, version number and assembly relationship to avoid inconsistency between the model and the drawings.

Drawing annotation

Mark critical dimensions, tolerances, threads, chamfers, surface roughness and heat treatment requirements.

Acceptance requirements

Describe the test report, material certificate, appearance standards and packaging and transportation requirements.

Commonly Overlooked Details

01
Units and proportionsWrong inches, millimeters or scaling can directly impact quoting and processing.
02
Default toleranceWhen tolerances are not marked, the general standards or project conventions adopted should be stated.
03
Surface rangeAnodizing, spraying, marking, etc. require clear color, area and masking requirements.
